research_question: Under the frozen v18 operational contract, does replacing liquidity_trend_20_60_raw with the newly retained breakout_volume_confirmation_20d_raw produce a cleaner and more robust mixed price-volume family than the current retained two-signal baseline line?

feature_set.interpretation: stronger medium-term momentum should rank higher
signals that are simultaneously near breakout and experiencing recent amount-shock confirmation should rank higher

score_family_contract.missing_data_rule: Only score rows with at least 2 non-null ranked features; otherwise emit null model_score_D0 and preserve the row for audit.

guard_contract.guard_definition: Freeze the calibrated v18 ranking guard: only rows that are already ranking_eligible_D0 and whose 20-day average amount cross-sectional liquidity rank is >= 0.70 on the same signal_date may enter the ranking universe.
guard_contract.treatment_of_rows_below_guard: Remain in audit tables but must be excluded from ranking_state_daily eligibility.

substitution_contract.reason: Round 4 single-signal discovery produced breakout_volume_confirmation_20d_raw as a clean positive keeper with stronger Top10-minus-rank11_20 separation than the other newly tested orthogonal atomic hypotheses.

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, same TopK=10 width, and same v18 top-15 refresh hysteresis
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same v18 refreshed-portfolio implementation and same portfolio-extraction rule as the working reference

portfolio_extraction_contract_frozen.extraction_definition: Freeze the v17/v18 extraction rule: allocate capital only to ranks 1-10 on each signal_date, apply a deterministic linear rank-decay multiplier, and renormalize selected head weights to sum to 1.0 before cohort scaling.
portfolio_extraction_contract_frozen.weight_formula_detail: raw_multiplier(rank) = 1.00 - ((rank - 1) * (0.90 / 9)); rank 1 gets 1.00, rank 10 gets 0.10, ranks > 10 get 0.00

portfolio_refresh_contract_frozen.refresh_definition: Freeze the v18 refresh rule: retain an incumbent holding if it still has rank_position <= 15 on the new signal_date and still satisfies the frozen guard plus tradability requirements. Only vacated slots may be refilled from the highest-ranked non-held eligible names until 10 names are held.
portfolio_refresh_contract_frozen.replacement_rule: Fill remaining slots with highest-ranked non-held eligible names in ascending rank order until 10 names are held.
portfolio_refresh_contract_frozen.target_weight_rule: Equal-weight across currently held names after refresh; unfilled slots remain cash.

disallowed_changes: Do not add amount_shock_5_20_raw as a third standalone component inside this round.
Do not add any round-4 mixed candidates into this family.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change the frozen v18 refresh hysteresis rule.
Do not change portfolio extraction inside this round.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not sweep multiple family compositions or aggregation formulas inside this round.
notes: This round is opened only after round 4 completed with two clean positive keepers: amount_shock_5_20_raw and breakout_volume_confirmation_20d_raw.
The goal is not to remix many retained signals, but to perform one disciplined substitution test under the frozen v18 operational contract.
If this direct substitution still does not materially improve the family profile, the project should avoid further price-volume family remixing without genuinely new atomic discoveries.
